Interesants bija arī Freibergas veidotais projekts "Zini vai mini!". "Man vienmēr nācies savus projektus radīt pašai," atzīstas Freiberga. "Gandrīz nekad nav bijis tā, ka tos izveidotu kāds cits un aicinātu mani darbā," viņas balsī ieskanas mazliet smeldzīga nots. Taču, ja ieskatāmies arhīvā, kopā ar režisori Svetlanu Rudzīti, kas bijusi arī Sandras veidoto erudīcijas spēļu režisore, redaktorei bijusi iespēja piedalīties daudzu muzikālu šovu un pasākumu veidošanā. "Tā ir. Sveta mani pieaicināja daudzos muzikālos projektos. Gan Maestro Jāņu vakara svētku pasākumos, gan arī lieliskajos koncertos Kuldīgas estrādē, kam rakstīju scenārijus," apstiprina Freiberga. "Raidījumu ir bijis tik daudz, visus nudien neatceros." Skatoties fragmentus no dažādiem agrāk veidotiem raidījumiem, Sandra ik pa laikam pārsteigumā paceļ uzacis. Piemēram: "Ak, biju aizmirsusi, ka savulaik intervēju Al Bano un Rominu Paueri!" viņa izsaucas. "Tolaik, kad viņi sniedza koncertu Dzintaru koncertzālē. Tas bija tik sen!" Latvijas Sabiedriskā medija arhīvs patiešām glabā vērtības, ko prieks un interesanti skatīties ne tikai pieredzējušajai televīzijas redaktorei, bet arī skatītājiem. Raidījumā būs fragmenti no projektiem: "Apvārsnis", "Mozaīka", "Videofakts", "Pauze", "Laimes spēle", "Mini mani!", "Zini vai mini", "Citādi latviskais", "Nāc līdzās!", "Radīti mūzikai" un citiem.

programme.title: Lielās patiesības
programme.desc: Vai cilvēces attīstībā varam atrast ko prognozējamu un likumsakarīgu? Vai vēsturei ir mērķis? Vai tomēr cilvēces attīstība ir pilnīgi neprognozējams haoss? Pie šiem jautājumiem nonākam, vadoties no E. I. Siliņa eseju grāmatas "Lielo patiesību meklējumi" impulsiem. Fizikā redzam, ka daļiņu kustība pie noteiktiem apstākļiem no haosa pāriet koherentā stāvoklī. Vai šo likumu var attiecināt arī uz sabiedrības vēsturi? Par to - raidījuma vadītāja Ilmāra Latkovska sarunas ar Latvijas Universitātes profesoru Mārci Auziņu un Latvijas Kultūras akadēmijas vadošo pētnieku Gustavu Strengu.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Spēles "Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts" ciklā tiksimies ar visdažādāko profesiju pārstāvjiem, kurus vieno futbols! Pirmajā pusfinālā tiekas Sintijas Siliņas un Edgara Ražinska komandas. Sintija Siliņa - komandas kapteine, Rīgas cirka projektu vadītāja, horeogrāfe, ar interesi un specialitāti laikmetīgajā dejā. Četrus gadus ir futbola interešu apvienības "FC Edgari United" biedre. Sintijas futbola spēles manieri raksturo vieglums un neatlaidība ar neiztrūkstošu dejas elementu integrāciju, jo viņa strādā Rīgas cirkā kā Dejas mājas iniciatīvas projektu vadītāja. Valdis Jauģietis - savā darba dzīvē projektē būvkonstrukcijas. Apvienības "FC Edgari United" biedrs kopš 2022. gada. Amatieru futbola entuziasts, kuru raksturo nosvērts spēles stils. Dāvis Nore - strādā par zīmola direktoru vienā no lielākajām Somijas mobilo spēļu izstrādes kompānijām. "FC Edgari United" pievienojies 2021. gadā un sevi pozicionē kā pamatsastāva vārtsargu. Dāvi raksturo pašaizliedzīga spēle, nereti ar līdz pat asinīm nobrāztiem ceļgaliem un elkoņiem. Edgars Ražinskis - komandas kapteinis. Strādā Rīgas plānošanas reģionā, ir tūrisma nozares profesionālis un pasniedzējs, studējis uzņēmējdarbību un antropoloģiju. Klubā "Edgari United" darbojas kopš tā pirmsākumiem 2021. gadā. Līdz ar briedumu no smailes uzbrucēja ir pārtapis par vārtsargu. Edgars Jēkabsons - bērnībā sapņojis kļūt par programmētāju, tas arī noticis. Ir informāciju tehnoloģiju speciālists un politiķis. Edgars pievienojās "Edgari United" klubam 2022. gada septembrī. Sirdi priecē ātri, eleganti un labi lietojami IT risinājumi. Papildu hobijs ir politika. Raimonds Ķirķis - dzejnieks, atdzejotājs un literatūrkritiķis. Studējis kultūras teoriju, menedžmentu un vēsturi, filozofiju. Kluba "Edgari United" pirmajā diplomu pasniegšanā saņēmis galveno balvu par sniegumu 2023. gadā, vēlāk gan spēles līmenis ir krities. Ir "Ostapenko" kausa vairākkārtējs ieguvējs. Interesē literatūra un labais stils.

programme.title: Pasaules panorāma
programme.desc: Globālo ziņu laikmetā notikums Āzijā vai Amerikas kontinentā jau rīt var mainīt dzīvi Eiropā, bet lēmums, kas pieņemts Rīgā – atbalsoties visā pasaulē. "Pasaules panorāma" piedāvā neatkarīgas un uzticamas ziņas, atspoguļojot un analizējot ārpolitikas aktualitātes, kā arī sarunas ar politologiem, ārpolitikas ekspertiem, pasaulē pazīstamām personībām par svarīgāko Baltijā un Ziemeļvalstīs, citviet Eiropā, kā arī visā pasaulē. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta ārzemju ziņu redaktori Toms Pastors un Ina Strazdiņa.

programme.title: 1000 jūdzes Zelta krastā
programme.desc: Dīdžejs Egons Reiters un mūziķis Kārlis Kazāks devās ekspedīcijā, lai uzzinātu par kādreiz vareno Ašanti karaļvalsti, kur dzīvoja viens no bagātākajiem karaļiem uz zemes. Ar karali ekspedīcijas komandai bija iespēja tikties golfa laukumā, kur augstību pavadīja astoņi bruņoti sargi. 12 dienās ekspedīcijas komanda veica 2000 km garu maršrutu. Ceļotāji no Ganas galvaspilsētas Akras devās uz valsts tālāko ziemeļu pilsētu Bolgatangu Burkina Faso pierobežā, apmeklēja civilizācijas neskartus zemnieku ciematiņus dziļi savannā un piedalījās Ganas 55. neatkarības dienas svinībās valsts otrajā lielākajā pilsētā Kumasi.

programme.title: 1000 jūdzes Zelta krastā
programme.desc: Dīdžejs Egons Reiters un mūziķis Kārlis Kazāks devās ekspedīcijā, lai uzzinātu par kādreiz vareno Ašanti karaļvalsti, kur dzīvoja viens no bagātākajiem karaļiem uz zemes. Ar karali ekspedīcijas komandai bija iespēja tikties golfa laukumā, kur augstību pavadīja astoņi bruņoti sargi. 12 dienās ekspedīcijas komanda veica 2000 km garu maršrutu. Ceļotāji no Ganas galvaspilsētas Akras devās uz valsts tālāko ziemeļu pilsētu Bolgatangu Burkina Faso pierobežā, apmeklēja civilizācijas neskartus zemnieku ciematiņus dziļi savannā un piedalījās Ganas 55. neatkarības dienas svinībās valsts otrajā lielākajā pilsētā Kumasi.

programme.title: Globalizācijas un mēs
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ražots Vācijā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Piņķi nav tikai Pierīgai raksturīgā ainava, ko pamanām, traucoties pa Jūrmalas šoseju: jaunbūvju ciemats, ledus halle, liels tirdzniecības centrs, starptautiskā skola, jāšanas sporta halle. Aiz šīm būvēm ir vēl citi Piņķi, ko līdz Atmodai pazina kā Salienu, jo padomju laikā tur uzcēla sovhoza "Saliena" (vēlāk Bulduru sovhoztehnikums) centru. Tagad tur pulsē ciemata izglītības un kultūras dzīve. Bet pavisam maz palicis no vēsturiskajiem Piņķiem, ko Rīgas rāte sāka veidot 1602. gadā kā Piņķu muižu. Lielākoties tie ir arhīva dokumenti, pāris fotogrāfijas, atmiņu stāsti un mēmais liecinieks laikmetu griežos - 1874. gadā celtā Piņķu baznīca, ko dzejnieks Aleksandrs Čaks iemūžinājis latviešu strēlniekiem veltītajā poēmā "Mūžības skartie".

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Šoreiz atgriezīsimies mums labi pazīstamās Rīgas apkaimēs. Mežciems, kā arī Krāsotāju un Avotu iela "Ielas garumā" izstaigāti krustu šķērsu, bet katra jauna paaudze pilsētā pamana un izceļ kādas tai interesantas un svarīgas nianses. Šos pilsētvides stāstus apkopo izaicinājumu un risinājumu platforma "Tandeems", tāpēc dosimies pastaigā kopā ar dažiem sacensības "Pilsētas leģendas" laureātiem Savukārt dzīvei Čiekurkalnā sekojam vairāk nekā 20 gadu garumā un tur vienmēr ieraugām kādas labas pārmaiņas. Čiekurkalniešiem izdodas pacelties kādu pēdu virs zemes - gan Vinnija Pūka gaisa balonā, gan uz brāļu Irbīšu spārniem.

programme.title: Province
programme.desc: Tas nu varētu būt fakts - Durbe ir mazākā Latvijas pilsēta, kurā uz vienu iedzīvotāju saražo visvairāk ziedu un dažādu stādu. Lai gan par ražošanu to īsti neklātos saukt, jo vienam no šī rekorda galvenajiem vaininiekiem Jānim Putram dārznieka arods ir sirdslieta. Savu pirmo siltumīcu vecāku saimniecībā turpat Durbē Jānis uzslēja jau sešpadsmit gadu vecumā, kad amata prasmes vēl apguva Bulduru tehnikumā. Nu jau siltumnīcu platības ir jārēķina kvadrātmetru tūkstošos, bet ziedu un stādu skaits - simtos tūkstošu. Vēl viena Jāņa aizraušanās ir picu cepšana savā īpašajā, no Itālijas pārvestajā malkas krāsnī. Un tikpat neatņemama viņa dzīves sastāvdaļa ir sportošana. Šim nolūkam, ar domu - sev un draugiem, Jānis Liepājā ir ierīkojis mūsdienīgu fitnesa zāli. Trīs hobijdarbi, pēc Jāņa domām, esot vislieliskākais veids, kā neļauties ikdienas rutīnai.

programme.title: Gudrs, vēl gudrāks
programme.desc: Teātra dienu spēlē "Gudrs, vēl gudrāks" svinēsim kopā ar 12. klašu skolēniem. Lūk, pirmā pusfināla divpadsmit dalībnieki: Arella Zariņa (Rīgas Āgenskalna Valsts ģimnāzija), Estere Kuple (Valmieras Valsts ģimnāzija), Paula Feldmane (Rojas vidusskola), Sabīne Paula Tomiņa (Rīgas Centra humanitārā vidusskola), Timurs Dobrovoļskis (Rīgas Valsts 1. ģimnāzija), Sandija Strautniece (Andreja Upīša Skrīveru vidusskola), Katrīna Kalnbērza (Rīgas Valsts 3. ģimnāzija), Jānis Poots (Rīgas Valsts vācu ģimnāzija), Elīna Valdmane (Rīgas Hanzas vidusskola), Edgars Pidžakovs (Majoru vidusskola), Anna Reizniece (Siguldas Valsts ģimnāzija), Arvis Betlers (Viļānu vidusskola). Muzikāls sveiciens - no grupas "YŪT", dziesma "Saki".

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: "Kultūrdevā" viesojas režisors Mārtiņš Kalita, kura veidotā izrāde "Freimanis" piedzīvojusi pirmizrādi Liepājas teātrī. Kaut arī Mārtiņš Freimanis aizgāja mūžībā ļoti jauns, viņa balss un mūzika joprojām skan radio stacijās, bet izrādē mūzika skan aktiera Valta Skujas izpildījumā. Raidījuma otrajā daļā viesosies divas kinorežisores - Laila Pakalniņa un Alise Zariņa. Lailas filma "Putnubiedēkļi" jau saņēmusi divas "Lielā Kristapa" balvas, bet filmai "Čuksti pagrabā" Talsos rit pēdējās filmēšanas dienas. Alises jūtīgā filma "Nospiedumi" pašlaik ir skatāma uz lielajiem ekrāniem Latvijas kinoteātros, un tās balvu kontā jau ir cienījama festivālu pieredze un trīs "Lielā Kristapa" balvas.

programme.title: Aculiecinieks
programme.desc: 13 minūšu gari televīzijas stāsti vēsta par notikumiem un Latvijā īpašiem cilvēkiem, aptverot vēsturiskus, zinātnes, izglītības, pilsētas, lauku un daudzus citus tematus.

programme.title: Purpura pārdevēja. Veltījums Lidijai Lasmanei
programme.desc: Lidija Lasmane teikusi: "Es sapņoju, ka mēs visi kā tauta varētu reiz aizdoties uz baznīcu un nožēlot savas nepareizās rīcības, kļūdas un nodevības, un saņemt Piedošanu no Augšienes, lai tālāk dotos atjaunoti – pilni Dzīvības..." Koncertizrāde "Purpura pārdevēja" veidota kā apliecinājums cilvēka gara un gribas spēkam. Ticībai un godīgumam. Mūsu brīvība ir dārgi atpirkta, un ikviens esam atbildīgi par savu, savas tautas un valsts morāles sliekšņu uzturēšanu. "Atjaunošanās, Augšāmcelšanās vēl joprojām ir iespējama. No tās kaut kas jau atspīd, bet tā vēl nav sasniegta – ne personiskā, ne tautas, ne valsts dzīvē. Šī brīža vērtību apliecinājumi kā sēkla mūsu nākotnei." /Lidija Lasmane/ Iestudējums veidots trīs daļās – pirmā vēstīs par Lidiju Lasmani, disidenti. Sižetā mīsies Ingas Ābeles pieraksti un Bībeles sižets. Sekos stāsts par gulagu un cietumiem, skanēs cietuma biedrenes Irinas Ratušinskas dzeja, ko runās aktrise Guna Zariņa. Noslēdzošā daļa – Dieva paļāvība, lūgšana, piedošana. Diriģents Sigvards Kļava: "Es iedomājos to mazo, aizrestoto lodziņu, kas tev ir viss – svaiga gaisa malks, saules gaismas avots, vienīgais punkts, caur kuru tev lūgties..." Izrādes skaņu rakstu veidos Maijas Einfeldes, Imanta Zemzara, Pētera Vaska un Artūra Grīnupa mūzika.

programme.title: Pieminekli celt. Pieminot padomju režīma deportāciju upurus
programme.desc: Kārlim Bērziņam bija 9 gadi, kad arī viņa ģimeni 25. marta rītausmā 1949. gadā aizveda uz Tomskas apgabalu. 79 gadus vecais vīrs pēdējo reizi, kā pats saka, mēro ceļu uz savu bērnības dienu sādžu, kur ķēra ūdensžurkas, lai palīdzētu ģimenei Sibīrijas skarbumā izdzīvot. Bērziņš vairākus gadus devās uz Sibīriju, kur meklēja sen aizmirstas izsūtīto latviešu kapavietas. Brāļu kapu komitejas uzdevumā viņš apzināja vietas, kur varētu uzstādīt pieminekļus represētajiem, kuri neatgriezās Latvijā no izsūtījuma. Lai būtu vieta, kur radinieki var aizbraukt un pieminēt, jo daudzas sādžas ir izzudušas un arī kapi nav atrodami. Vispirms Kārlis Bērziņš paša spēkiem nogādāja un uzstādīja Tomskā laukakmeni – piemiņas zīmi – no Latvijas. Bet vēlāk Novojuginā atklāja pirmo Latvijas valsts finansēto pieminekli ar iegravētiem 252 represēto vārdiem un uzvārdiem. Aiz katra iegravētā vārda ir skaudri personiski stāsti, kas savijas un atklājas šajā dokumentālajā stāstā.

programme.title: Žagari
programme.desc: Brāļu Andreja un Jura Žagaru dzīves ir ritējušas līdzās, savijoties un saskaroties jau no bērnības Cēsīs, kur piedzima Juris. Andrejs dzimis, mammai esot izsūtījumā Sibīrijā. Abi izstudēja aktiermākslu, kas abus – katru citā dzīves posmā – aizveda uz Dailes teātri. Abi skarbajos deviņdesmitajos kļuva par uzņēmējiem: Andrejs izveidoja restorānu biznesu, un rīdziniekus joprojām pulcē "Osiris", bet Juris pārvērta uzņēmējdarbībā savu lielo kaislību slēpošanu, radot Žagarkalnu. Abu biznesā lielāka loma bija baudījumam un adrenalīnam, nevis ienākumiem. Abi brāļi kļuva par mākslas institūciju vadītājiem – Juris ar domubiedriem uzsāka un joprojām turpina Cēsu Mākslas festivālu un vadīja Cēsu koncertzāli, bet Andrejs mūža mīlestību atrada Latvijas Nacionālajā operā, kuru kā direktors vadīja septiņpadsmit gadus, kļūstot arī par interesantu operu režisoru. Tāds bija filmas veidotāju sākotnējais plāns – filmā rādīt divu izcilu personību, brāļu sāncensību, sīki dokumentējot viņu ikdienu un akcentējot abu lielo nozīmi Latvijas kultūras telpā. Protams, abu dzīvēs nav tikai līdzības. Tuvinieki brāļus raksturo kā ļoti atšķirīgus un vienlaikus – ļoti tuvus. Andreja dzīves lūzuma punkts – padzīšana no operas – tā arī netika pārvarēts. Filmā Andrejs saka, ka pāris gadus pēc tam viņš izvairījies kaut kur doties gar operu. Kad LNOB direktors bija paziņojis, ka nekandidēs uz vēl vienu termiņu, Andrejs Žagars izlēma pieteikties valdes konkursam. Taču tuvākajiem bija skaidrs, ka par operas direktoru, pat ja paspēs pieteikties konkursam, Andrejs vairs nekļūs nekad. Slimība bija tā, kas neļāva piepildīties daudzām Andreja iecerēm, kuras viņš līdz pēdējam plānoja piecus gadus uz priekšu. Slimība lika Jurim paraudzīties uz brāli citām acīm. Slimība arī pārveidoja mūsu filmas scenāriju, sāncensības vietā uzrakstot stāstu par brāļu mīlestību.

programme.title: Daiļslidošana. Pasaules čempionāts
programme.desc: Oficiālās sacensības beigušās, un atlikuši vien paraugdemonstrējumi, kuros varēs piedalīties visu disciplīnu laureāti, tāpat arī vairāki mājinieki čehi un citi īpaši uzaicinātie sportisti. Te tiesneši vairs nevērtē sniegumu, var slidot brīvi un atraisīti un pēc saviem ieskatiem izvēlēties programmu. Paraugdemonstrējumi parasti ļoti patīk skatītājiem, jo tie sniedz īstu estētisko baudījumu. Pēc tam būs beigusies sezona vēl vienā ziemas sporta veidā.

programme.title: Zinātnes noslēpumi
programme.desc: Dažādas mūsu ikdienā ierastas darbības un notikumi, izskaidroti no zinātnes viedokļa.

programme.title: Šerifs
programme.desc: Kapteinis Kaders Šerifs ļoti mīl savu darbu policijā. Viņš dzīvo tieši pretī policijas iecirknim. Gadiem zināms kā radikālu izmeklēšanas metožu piekritējs, Kaders sastopas ar jauno kapteini, Kadera partneri Adelīnu Briāru. Abi pretpoli, kuri tik ļoti darbā pievelkas, izrādās visai dinamisks policistu pāris! Alžīriešu izcelsmes franču aktieris Abdelhafids Metalsi televīzijā strādā kopš 2000. gadu sākuma, un šarmantais kapteinis Kaders ir viņa līdz šim spilgtākā loma.

programme.title: Šerifs
programme.desc: Kapteinis Kaders Šerifs ļoti mīl savu darbu policijā. Viņš dzīvo tieši pretī policijas iecirknim. Gadiem zināms kā radikālu izmeklēšanas metožu piekritējs, Kaders sastopas ar jauno kapteini, Kadera partneri Adelīnu Briāru. Abi pretpoli, kuri tik ļoti darbā pievelkas, izrādās visai dinamisks policistu pāris! Alžīriešu izcelsmes franču aktieris Abdelhafids Metalsi televīzijā strādā kopš 2000. gadu sākuma, un šarmantais kapteinis Kaders ir viņa līdz šim spilgtākā loma.

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Mūzikas burve Keita Buša
programme.desc: Dokumentālais stāsts par daudzpusīgo leģendu Keitu Bušu - dziesmu autori, komponisti, dziedātāju, dejotāju un performanču mākslinieci. Viņas radītās dziesmas pavēra jaunus apvāršņus, ienesot popmūzikā vēl nepieredzētu savādību, poētisku un radikālu skanējumu. Keita Buša daudzējādā ziņā bija pioniere, viņa kontrolēja savu albumu producēšanu, radīja multimediālus un teatrālus koncertus un uzņēma savus videoklipus vēl krietni pirms "MTV" parādīšanās. Intervijās ar Keitu Bušu un viņas līdzgaitniekiem tiek atklāts viņas daiļrades brīnumainais un joprojām suģestējošais spēks, kas turpina iedvesmot arī jauno paaudzi.

programme.title: Mūžīgā ēna
programme.desc: Džeksonu ģimene saņem bēdu vēsti par to, ka Emīlija ir nogalināta. Viņas vīrs Sidnijs sākumā tiek uzskatīts par vienu no aizdomās turētajiem. Viņš atzīst, ka zinājis par sievas nodarbošanos, taču drīz vien viņa labais vārds tiek atjaunots. Laiks iet, un kāda sieviete Marsela Klakstone piedzīvo brutālu uzbrukumu, bet viņa izdzīvo, un policija nesaskata saistību ar iepriekš notikušām slepkavībām. Vēlāk tiek atrasts vēl viens līķis, šoreiz tā ir Airīna Ričardsone. Un izmeklētāji aptver, ka viņiem ir darīšana ar sērijveida slepkavu. Gadu pēc pirmās slepkavības Deniss Hobans nevar sniegt nekādus rezultātus, un viņš tiek noņemts no galvenā izmeklētāja amata.

programme.title: Globalizācijas un mēs
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ražots Vācijā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Aculiecinieks
programme.desc: 13 minūšu gari televīzijas stāsti vēsta par notikumiem un Latvijā īpašiem cilvēkiem, aptverot vēsturiskus, zinātnes, izglītības, pilsētas, lauku un daudzus citus tematus.

programme.title: Personība. 100 g kultūras
programme.desc: Gan mūzikas notikumu tiešraides, gan raidījumi un diskusijas par literatūru, kino, vizuālo un tautas mākslu, gan populāro kultūru, kas attīsta latvisko identitāti.

programme.title: Personība. 100 g kultūras
programme.desc: Gan mūzikas notikumu tiešraides, gan raidījumi un diskusijas par literatūru, kino, vizuālo un tautas mākslu, gan populāro kultūru, kas attīsta latvisko identitāti.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Spēles "Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts" ciklā tiksimies ar visdažādāko profesiju pārstāvjiem, kurus vieno futbols! Pirmajā pusfinālā tiekas Sintijas Siliņas un Edgara Ražinska komandas. Sintija Siliņa - komandas kapteine, Rīgas cirka projektu vadītāja, horeogrāfe, ar interesi un specialitāti laikmetīgajā dejā. Četrus gadus ir futbola interešu apvienības "FC Edgari United" biedre. Sintijas futbola spēles manieri raksturo vieglums un neatlaidība ar neiztrūkstošu dejas elementu integrāciju, jo viņa strādā Rīgas cirkā kā Dejas mājas iniciatīvas projektu vadītāja. Valdis Jauģietis - savā darba dzīvē projektē būvkonstrukcijas. Apvienības "FC Edgari United" biedrs kopš 2022. gada. Amatieru futbola entuziasts, kuru raksturo nosvērts spēles stils. Dāvis Nore - strādā par zīmola direktoru vienā no lielākajām Somijas mobilo spēļu izstrādes kompānijām. "FC Edgari United" pievienojies 2021. gadā un sevi pozicionē kā pamatsastāva vārtsargu. Dāvi raksturo pašaizliedzīga spēle, nereti ar līdz pat asinīm nobrāztiem ceļgaliem un elkoņiem. Edgars Ražinskis - komandas kapteinis. Strādā Rīgas plānošanas reģionā, ir tūrisma nozares profesionālis un pasniedzējs, studējis uzņēmējdarbību un antropoloģiju. Klubā "Edgari United" darbojas kopš tā pirmsākumiem 2021. gadā. Līdz ar briedumu no smailes uzbrucēja ir pārtapis par vārtsargu. Edgars Jēkabsons - bērnībā sapņojis kļūt par programmētāju, tas arī noticis. Ir informāciju tehnoloģiju speciālists un politiķis. Edgars pievienojās "Edgari United" klubam 2022. gada septembrī. Sirdi priecē ātri, eleganti un labi lietojami IT risinājumi. Papildu hobijs ir politika. Raimonds Ķirķis - dzejnieks, atdzejotājs un literatūrkritiķis. Studējis kultūras teoriju, menedžmentu un vēsturi, filozofiju. Kluba "Edgari United" pirmajā diplomu pasniegšanā saņēmis galveno balvu par sniegumu 2023. gadā, vēlāk gan spēles līmenis ir krities. Ir "Ostapenko" kausa vairākkārtējs ieguvējs. Interesē literatūra un labais stils.

programme.title: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma
programme.desc: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma ir sirsnīgi muzikāls raidījums, kurā tiek atspoguļotas tautā vispopulārākās latviešu mūzikas dzīves norises šī vārda visplašākajā nozīmē.

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Sporta studija
programme.desc: "Mūsu uzņemtais virziens izsakāms neformālā sauklī "sports sabiedrībai!". Šis virziens tika uzsākts jau iepriekš ar "Tautas sporta" sižetu sērijām un sporta laukumu kampaņām. Turpmāk LTV Tautas sporta sižeti būs tradicionāla "Sporta studijas" sastāvdaļa. "Sporta Studiju" vadīs rūdītie sporta žurnālisti Dāvids Ernštreits un Reinis Ošenieks, kā arī jaunās sporta žurnālistikas zvaigznes Andris Auziņš, Matīss Timofejevs un Raimonds Gekišs. "Sporta studijas" aktualitātēm sekojiet https://www.facebook.com/LTVSportaStudija

programme.title: Mani hiti
programme.desc: "MyHits TV" atskaņo gan pašmāju, gan ārzemju labākos un karstākos šībrīža hitus – rūpīgi atlasīti TOP 40 formāta ritmi jūsu ekrānā!

programme.title: Mani hiti
programme.desc: "MyHits TV" atskaņo gan pašmāju, gan ārzemju labākos un karstākos šībrīža hitus – rūpīgi atlasīti TOP 40 formāta ritmi jūsu ekrānā!

programme.title: Dutch Caribbean Coastguards
programme.desc: We went on a mission with the Coast Guard of Curaçao, Aruba, Bonaire and Sint Maarten. Every day they carry out impressive operations, from rescuing tourists in distress to intercepting drug shipments at sea and receiving undocumented immigrants. This important and also dangerous work is done by a team of committed professionals, who guarantee safety in the Caribbean Sea with the help of ships and helicopters. They are supported by the Royal Netherlands Navy.

programme.title: Area 51: The CIAs Secret Files
programme.desc: AREA 51: THE CIAS SECRET covers the true story of ground-breaking research into aviation that took place at the Groom Lake Testing Facility, otherwise known as Area 51, which ensured U.S. aerial supremacy from the Cold War through to the present day. Utilizing CIA documents that have recently been declassified this program identifies specific individuals who worked at the top secret base in a variety of roles - the construction workers, pilots and security guards. Their personal testimonies provide a unique impression not just of the work that was carried out, but of the site itself. We reveal just how tight security had to be to keep the development of the U2, A12, HAVE BLUE and F117 Nighthawk aviation programs under wraps. This is a film that concentrates on delivering history and factual accuracy in a fresh and engaging style - one that answers the question "what really happened at Area 51?"

programme.title: UFOs: Investigating the Unknown
programme.desc: Project Blue Book and the investigation into UFOs closes. There is no evidence that mysterious objects represent any threat to U.S. national security. But harrowing incidents of UFO sightings continue and the unexplained malfunction of U.S. nuclear missiles after an incursion leave the U.S. defenseless. Three former Air Force officers who served at nuclear weapons bases in the late 1960s break two decades of silence to tell their story.

programme.title: UFOs: Investigating the Unknown
programme.desc: From a 1986 sighting over Alaska by Japanese Airline pilots, to a 1997 UAP sighting over Phoenix Arizona and a flying disc over the Chicago OHare airport in 2008, hundreds of witnesses come forward without any official feedback from the US government. Years later many of the pilots and government officials who witnessed these sightings come together for the first time to share their story in a 2007 press conference.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: HSI agents in Miami discover a shipment of fish found to contain 37 kilos of cocaine worth almost 2 million dollars. Meanwhile, San Diego CBP officers disrupt multiple human smuggling attempts at the San Ysidro border involving 8 individuals in 3 different vehicles. And CBP agriculture specialists in Atlanta search passengers to stop the spread of destructive invasive species stemming from prohibited food items.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: San Diego CBP officers discover a battery charger concealing $14,500 of meth before stopping a vehicle bursting with meth and fentanyl worth $589,000. Meanwhile, officers at JFK uncover a collection of ancient Bactrian gold beads connected to a priceless treasure trove looted from Afghanistan. In Miami, CBP apprehends a traveler carrying $37,500 of ketamine in shampoo bottles, and HSI executes an undercover bust of the intended recipient.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Draining Lake Michigan uncovers Chicagos secret history. The latest sonar technology exposes a catastrophe that kills 300, solves a tragic Christmas mystery, uncovers a game-changing naval training programme from World War 2 and reveals an engineering marvel that stops the fastest growing city in the world from choking to death. Chicagos spectacular story is all about ambition and risk - only sometimes those risks end in disaster.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: January 15th, 2009 - Less than two minutes after taking off from New Yorks LaGuardia Airport, US Airways Flight #1549 collides with a flock of birds. Both engines suddenly lose all thrust, and the Airbus A-320 begins falling from the sky. The crew desperately tries to restart their engines, but cant. With New York on one side and New Jersey on the other, Captain Chesley Sullenberger is running out of options. Searching desperately for a place to land, Sullenberger warns passengers and crew to brace for impact and tells the control tower that he will be ditching the plane in the icy waters of the Hudson River. Amazingly, all 155 people on board survive, and investigators try to determine how birds could have crippled two of the worlds most advanced jet engines. Can they prevent it from happening again?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: A loud vibration and the smell of smoke warn the pilots of British Midland Flight 92 that they have an engine fire on board. The crew shuts down the engine and tries to land at a nearby airport, but their second engine fails before they can get safely on the ground. Just meters from the runway, the 737-400 slams into an embankment beside Britains busy M1 motorway. It seems like a rare case of dual engine failure, but investigators soon learn that a tragic misunderstanding may be the real cause of the crash.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Nicknamed the king of beers, Budweisers St. Louis brewery remains true to its roots, and still uses the very same yeast that first launched the brand back in 1876. Meet the inventor and the cryogenic processor behind Dippin Dots--the fruit-flavor ice cream beads that literally chill out in a bath of liquid nitrogen. If carrot cake is your thing, youll go bananas for Ne-Mos Escondido, California headquarters where 80,000 cakes are baked and iced daily.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: An authentic French brand steeped in history, visit Babybels South Dakota headquarters where 600,000 pounds of milk are transformed into one million bite-size cheeses every day. Famous for his soup-slinging antics on the sitcom Seinfeld, meet the official face of Soupman and find out how the company cooks its hearty lentil soup right in the box. Part slaw and part salsa, Slawsa combines super-food cabbage with a tangy kick, and just a single batch makes enough to fill nearly 5,000 jars.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Dubai International is in the global race to be the worlds biggest airport. A massive new concourse for the worlds largest fleet of A380s uses over a 150 million man-hours and 930 thousand cubic meters of concrete. Unafraid of new challenges, the airport was the first ever to close two runways back to back for construction. In the words of its Engineering CEO, "the bar is getting higher and higher." There is no room for failure in Dubai.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: During Dubai Internationals busy Holiday period, Andrew must fix a serious engine failure that threatens to cause delays across the airport, Mel deals with the fallout from an onboard theft and Hassan catches a passenger smuggling a million dollars worth of diamonds in her body. Meanwhile, Paul must fit two new 9-ton escalators, which are vital for carrying passengers to the new Concourse D building. But first he needs to get them through a tiny door…

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Car SOS is back for a sixth series with parts blagging petrolhead Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend breathing life into classic cars for unsuspecting owners. This series yet another array of iconic cars including a 1990s Lancia Delta Integrale, a 60s Citroen DS, an 80s Peugeot 205 Rally car and a 1950s MGA. Special guests this series include actor James Nesbitt and Monte Carlo legend Paddy Hopkirk.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on a 1989 VW Golf GTi, one of the most iconic cars to have come out of the 1980s and one which just happens to be Tim Shaws all-time favourite car. The boys challenge this time is to make this particular Golf suitable for its owner Darren, a former bus driver who was left disabled and partially sighted after a tragic road accident in which he saved the life of his young grandson.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz head to Cambridge to rescue a big cuddly and cherished Range Rover. The Range Rover represented a huge change of gear for Land rover in 1970 when it was introduced. A big, comfortable car that was as smooth as a big saloon but could easily keep up with a Land Rover across a muddy field. The later 1991 Range Rover Vogue that Tim and Fuzz collect symbolized freedom and happy days for Margaret, her husband and their family. Used to tow their caravan all over the UK, this 4 wheel drive was always dependable that durable. Now a sad reminder of better times, the car is in desperate need of some TLC; Enter CarSOS. Fuzz stresses when he realizes the whole car is tired, rusty and likely to be a world of parts finding pain. For Tim its a challenge he cant resist, coming up with the blag of his life to make this big project possible. The biggest challenge of all though is making the car accessible for Margaret who, with her disability getting worse, has started to really struggle to climb on board the tall car. Fuzz and Tim decide the way forward is to fit a whole new adjustable air suspension system. Finding a way to fit that in among the crowded body shell as well as overhauling tired major components such as both front and rear axles, keeps Fuzz flat out for days. Tim meanwhile sets out to find out how to make the best veneer in the country. All this, plus replacement parts in every other nook and cranny of this complex car, plus the usual spectacular paint job, result in a massive transformation. But will Margaret think a showroom rebirth is the right thing to do to her beloved car, and what has Fuzz been up to?

programme.title: Superstructures: Engineering Marvels
programme.desc: With multinational input, the ISS is currently the largest single structure humans have put into space. Constructed between1998 and 2011, and continuously occupied since November 2000, it now weighs 391 tonnes. The first module, the Russia Zarya, was launched by a Proton rocket 20 Nov 1998. Two weeks later, STS 88, a space shuttle flight, added the NASA Unity, or Node 1 module. Astronauts from STS 88 then connected the two parts of the station together. The truss, solar panels and airlocks were launched in stages throughout the ISS lifetime and in 2017 new docking adapters were added for future commercial spacecraft arrivals. Current plans are to operate to 2024 and maybe 2028.

programme.title: Superstructures: Engineering Marvels
programme.desc: This brand new series reveals the extraordinary feats of engineering hidden inside the worlds most spectacular man-made constructions. From the worlds biggest plane and largest free-spanning dome to the tallest building and the largest space ship, each superstructure is taken apart using state-of-the-art CGI and insight from world class specialists to reveal the startling innovations that turn it from dream to reality.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Ruins excavated on Pitcairn Island shed light on a previously unknown civilization. In the jungle of Borneo, researchers discover a strange green light in the pitch-dark forest. The remains of a long-lost temple are found decaying on the Greek island of Euboea. Coral rubble unearthed on Sudans Suakin Island unveils the vibrant past of a marine trade center in the Red Sea.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Coastal erosion exposes skeletal remains, revealing the haunting past of Medieval floating prisons. A special type of spider is discovered on an isolated island. Archaeologists uncover evidence that could point to the fate of the lost Roanoke settlers. Thousands of dead seals are found with strange corkscrew wounds in Canada, confounding experts.

programme.title: Decoding Historys Prophecies
programme.desc: Amid civil war in 14th century Mongol-controlled China, scholar and strategist Liu Bowen lends his talents to a dynasty on the rise. But his name is also remembered for a more mysterious talent: fortune-telling with what some say is frightening precision. A series of cryptic prophecies earns him the moniker of Chinas "Nostradamus." In Ancient Rome, Julius Caesar receives a warning that his life is in danger. The prophecy, uttered by an Etruscan soothsayer, is divined through the strange art of haruspicy. Caesar ignores the omen at his own peril. Amongst the hills of the Scottish Lowlands, the influential Erskine family becomes haunted by a mysterious prophecy, presaging and inflicting countless moments of tragedy and heartbreak.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Perus biggest airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest problem: cocaine smuggling. Police rush to handle a rare incident on a domestic flight: something suspicious in a Serbian citizens bag. Agents find liquid cocaine disguised in drink bottles in another mans bag. A passenger without luggage reappears carrying a suitcase and agents rush to investigate. Counterfeit cash is uncovered in the mail facility.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Perus biggest airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest problem: cocaine smuggling. Police stop a woman travelling with her 5-year-old. If shes a carrier, agents must figure out what to do with the child. A Mexican citizen is found with a large amount of beer and soft drinks. All these goods may contain cocaine. Officers uncover a creative new method of hiding cocaine in food packaging.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: An out-of-control turboprop breaks apart while trying to land at Dusseldorf airport, instantly killing everyone on board. German investigators locate every piece of the wreckage within the huge crash site, then painstakingly reconstruct the entire plane in order to determine what went wrong on board Nuremberg Flight 108. Investigators soon uncover a piece of the wreckage with telltale signs of a lightning strike. And as they dig deeper, find conclusive evidence that the powerful jolt jumped from the fuselage to the electrical system, causing a total power failure that disabled critical instruments and plunged the cockpit into darkness. Faced with a one-in-a-million disaster scenario no one saw coming, the disoriented crew lost control of their aircraft. Investigators conclude there was nothing they could have done to save their plane.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Colossal Machines
programme.desc: Catastrophic events often require life-saving machines, and to function reliably, they have a certain technological mystery. Emergency teams risk their lives when fighting earthquakes, forest fires and extreme nature events. With climate change affecting the globe and extreme situations occurring more often, advanced technology is a priority when designing machines that need to save lives.

programme.title: Colossal Machines
programme.desc: Contrary to popular opinion, nuclear energy can be very beneficial. In many industries, its being used to advance technology in unbelievable ways. Forensic and space mission systems engineers explain, in detail, the operation of radioisotope generators and the related systems that have been designed and powered by nuclear energy.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: In 1995, a bone of an extinct bear is found in a Slovenian cave that could rewrite our place in the story of evolution. The bone appears to be carved with intention by someone at least 10,000 years before humans arrived in that part of the world. Who made it and why? A simple black dress shoe sits in a glass case in the Heinz Nixdorf Museums Forum in Germany. The reason? More than just a shoe, this is a high-tech machine for its time, designed to do the impossible: beat the casino. And an intricate purple gemstone adorned with silver snakes, quartz scarabs and cryptic words, has a long history intertwined with illness, ruin, tragedy and death. Where did it originate, and could it really be cursed?

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: The lost colony of Roanoke is a historic mystery that has not been solved for over 400 years. An intriguing artifact was discovered in 1937: the Dare Stone. Apparently written by John White, it explains in detail what happened to the vanished colony. But is it real? World War I was the first major conflict to feature warplanes and, therefore, also the first to feature anti-air defence. How did an object resembling a satellite dish on wheels help gunners shoot down enemy planes? In Egypt, excavations of the Great Sphinx of Giza in 1817 uncovered six carved hunks of stone. Put together, they appear to be fragments of a large, braided stone beard, in the style of false beards worn by ancient pharaohs. The Sphinx never wore a beard … or did it?

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: Chess-playing computers are nothing new today, but how did a robot beat the worlds best chess players back in 1770? Is this the worlds first artificial intelligence, or is there sleight of hand at play? Charles Lindbergh was arguably the worlds most famous man in the 1930s, as the first to fly non-stop across the Atlantic and then have his son tragically kidnapped. Lesser known is his invention of a singular glass pump of elegant design. What is it for? A 2,400-year-old mummy is brought from Egypt to Croatia by a collector. Only after it is donated to a museum does anyone realize that this mummy is wrapped in the rarest remnant of a lost language. The writing on the wrappings is pored over by experts to decipher it. What does it say?

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue: Highway Havoc!
programme.desc: Journey through the unforgiving and inhospitable climate of Norways frozen mountains with the elite rescue crews who come to the aid of stranded travellers and battle round-the-clock to maintain access to vital road links. With sudden changes in the weather, from torrential rain to snow blizzards and sudden temperature changes, the teams have their work cut out for them. Risking life and limb in some of Europes harshest conditions, it takes a special breed of men and women to overcome the many challenges thay face on a daily basis. As the roads turn into icy bobsleigh tracks, haulage container vehicles and private cars and vans all get themselves into difficulties and need to be rescued by our road warrior heroes.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: Ice Road rescuers are tough guys physically, but they also must buck up mentally when the clock is ticking, and split-second decisions could make all the difference. In this episode Ole Henrik and Stig deal with a fuel truck with frozen brakes, Thord has a one-hour deadline, Ole Henriks crew needs three tow trucks to rescue a stuck rig, and Thord tries to squeeze his truck through an impossibly tight space to carry out his rescue.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: Chemicals. Garbage. Fish. A trucker needing a rescue isnt concerned about just his rig. The trucks cargo is another big worry. Stig is sent to rescue an animal transport carrying live pigs that got stuck in a ditch, Thord heads out to rescue a truck carrying hot asphalt that tipped when it moved over for oncoming traffic, on another rescue Thord races against time to rescue a truck carrying thousands of euros worth of fish.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Perus biggest airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest problem: cocaine smuggling. Police stop a woman travelling with her 5-year-old. If shes a carrier, agents must figure out what to do with the child. A Mexican citizen is found with a large amount of beer and soft drinks. All these goods may contain cocaine. Officers uncover a creative new method of hiding cocaine in food packaging.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Lima, Perus airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest threat: cocaine smuggling. X-Ray scans show unusual shapes in a womans platform shoes - and something shocking inside her body. A suspect says he has information to take down drug trafficking organizations. A suspect on a stopover may be carrying cocaine hidden in drink bottles. Energy pills destined for England may contain something else: high purity cocaine.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Primal Survivor
programme.desc: Hazen travels to the Malay Peninsula in search of the Mani tribe. These ancient hunter gatherers use traditional blowguns armed with poison tipped darts. Hazen is keen to join a hunt but first he must prove hes up to the challenge by surviving alone in this daunting wilderness. Home to vertical rock cliffs, wild jungle elephents and even tigers, its a dangerous envoironment where every step could be your last.

programme.title: Primal Survivor
programme.desc: Hazen travels to Papua New Guinea to meet the Mirr tribe. These hunter gatherers are famed for their rich culture and are fiercely protective of their land and people. Hazen is keen to attend a tribal wedding, but first has to prove himself worthy by heading out into the wilderness alone. Hes tasked with bringing back three items for the groom - all essential for the tribal nuptials. But the hostile terrain proves challenging and time is against him.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: An out-of-control turboprop breaks apart while trying to land at Dusseldorf airport, instantly killing everyone on board. German investigators locate every piece of the wreckage within the huge crash site, then painstakingly reconstruct the entire plane in order to determine what went wrong on board Nuremberg Flight 108. Investigators soon uncover a piece of the wreckage with telltale signs of a lightning strike. And as they dig deeper, find conclusive evidence that the powerful jolt jumped from the fuselage to the electrical system, causing a total power failure that disabled critical instruments and plunged the cockpit into darkness. Faced with a one-in-a-million disaster scenario no one saw coming, the disoriented crew lost control of their aircraft. Investigators conclude there was nothing they could have done to save their plane.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: All over the airport, employees are working flat out to keep things running 24/7. Maintenance engineers Leigh Faulkner and Andy Clark desperately try to find two bolts which have dropped deep inside the engine of a Boeing 777. While Jo Di Biasi tries to help out a stranded Chinese family with no money to pay a huge excess baggage fee, Aref investigates a pair of suspect tennis balls in a package of electrical goods, which might contain drugs. Myles Jones tries to whip contractors into shape ahead of a boarding gate trial at the new Concourse D, and trainee firefighters Yared and Abdulrahman face a simulated cargo fire as they bid to become qualified airport firefighters.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Weather threatens to wreck Georgs plan to deal with a medical emergency. The diverted plane has ice on the wings, which may strand a plane full of passengers 1500 miles from Dubai. For Myles, desert rain leaks inside Concourse D and threatens to bring down part of the ceiling. Trainee firefighters Abdulrahman and Yared take a search and rescue test to get one step closer to graduating as airport firefighters. Jo struggles to get a group of Chinese tourists on their flight before they miss it and Leigh is up against it when he needs to fix a plane damaged by lightning.

programme.title: Built for Mars: The Perseverance Rover
programme.desc: NASAs Jet Propulsion Laboratory to follow the birth of the Perseverance rover, whose primary mission is to search for traces of life in an ancient river delta on Mars and collect samples for eventual return to Earth.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Glass may be the most popular construction material in the modern age. But constructing with glass is challenging and dangerous. It spontaneously breaks and falls from skyscrapers and it even crushes warehouse workers. We investigate the scientific anomaly of nickel sulfide inclusion and its effect on glass The vast majority of demolitions rely on the excavator to bring the building down. In this story we witness the perfect way to do it and contrast it with multiple examples of demolition by excavator fails. Operator error, unstable ground, unpredictable fall angles - we show it all.

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: Construction cranes are towers in the sky - except when they collapse. Our first story examines three disasters in Seattle, Manhattan and Bangkok. Three disasters: three different reasons for collapse. We examine what went wrong. The Artz Pedregal Mall in Mexico City had only been open a few months before the cantilevered section of the structure came crashing to the street below. How could a brand new building fail so dramatically? Whats so precarious about cantilever designs?

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: Every year, thousands of train crashes and devastating plane disasters occur worldwide. From hijackings to technological failures, these incidents highlight the inherent dangers of travel. Despite daily advancements, a single mistake can lead to catastrophic outcomes. Join us as we explore the 10 most significant air crashes and train accidents, uncovering the tragic events that capture global attention and impact countless lives.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, well dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Inside Sydney Airport
programme.desc: Operating under a noise curfew between 0600-2300 hours, the pressure is on at Sydney Airport to complete 900 plane movements in a day. Duty Manager George is confronted by a suspicious package. Meanwhile Rookie Mel suddenly has 2 medical emergencies in the space of an hour. And a freight handling crew have a problem with loading a bulging cargo pod.

programme.title: Paranatural
programme.desc: Across the planet thousands of crop circles have been reported. Most of these patterns are dismissed as hoaxes, but for some they beg the question, are these crop circles manmade, or something Paranatural? Is there any chance crop circles are messages from another world? Or are they just a series of pranks?

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: He terrorized the streets of Londons East End for three months in the autumn of 1888. He did this by killing, and then butchering, five women… at least. This brief murder spree earned the killer the grand daddy of all nicknames. That name, and the grotesque way he dispatched his victims has made Jack the Ripper the most notorious serial killer of all time. But no one knows who he was. In the years since the Ripper plied his grisly trade, the search for his identity has practically become a cottage industry. And its still going on. But is the search getting any closer to the truth? Some people believe the answer is yes. Crime writer Patricia Cornwell has peaked the worlds interest, and animosity, with her new book on the Rippers identity. Like almost everyone who has studied Jack the Ripper, Cornwell has a theory about who he was. The evidence she has amassed points to a prominent British artist named Walter Sickert, who was 28 at the time of the murders, and seemed to take an unusual interest in them. Sickerts artwork is macabre, his relationship with women dubious, and his childhood ripe for Freudian analysis. But can any of this prove he was a serial killer of prostitutes? For this, Cornwell points to the largest body of physical evidence remaining in the Ripper case: the hundreds of letters written to police during the time of the murders, supposedly by the murderer himself. Cornwell believes the letters tell a story - not just through their words, but also in the way those words were formed, the paper they were written on, and the sketches in the margins. She believes some of the letters are the work of Walter Sickert, and well talk to the paper and art conservators and handwriting analysts who are scouring the letters for clues. Meanwhile, other theories about the Rippers identity abound. We visit the murder sites with Ivor Edwards, a professional criminal turned amateur sleuth, who believes Jack the Ripper was a black magic occultist. Edwards reveals a pattern to the crimes that he believes incriminates suspect Robert Donston Stephenson, who may have killed his victims at strategic points on a map in order to desecrate the Christian cross. If Edwards theory sounds far-fetched, it isnt the first. There is also the Freemason angle - pointing to similarities between the ritualistic nature of the murders and ancient Masonic rites. And conspiracy theories flourish, even including the royal family. Can any of the theories hold true? Was Jack the Ripper an iconic artist, a black magic occultist, a member of the royal family, or just an anonymous ""Jack Doe"", whose name is lost to history? Ripperologists, forensic psychologists, crime experts and scientists investigate the clues in search of the Rippers identity.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Do you believe in hauntings? Since time immemorial, people have believed in the dead returning from the grave to haunt the living. But ""haunting"" itself is not a technical term. Its a general description of a paranormal phenomenon usually recurring in one particular location. A haunting can incorporate ghosts, poltergeists, demonic possession…and really anything else that gives you the heebie-geebies. But are hauntings real? We examine three cases from around the world to see if science can explain what so many believers cannot. First, we head to Long Island and the famous case, which led to ""The Amityville Horror"" its the story of the Lutzes, who move into their dream house at 112 Ocean Avenue, only to find themselves running for their lives just 28 days later. But was this a real horror story or just a hoax? Next, we go to Wilder, Kentucky, to a supposedly haunted country and western bar Bobby Mackeys Music World complete with a mechanical bull…that is believed to turn on without power. Can science hoe down with the supernatural in this haunted honky tonk? Finally, we conduct our own experiment on hauntings by filming ghost enthusiasts who have agreed to spend the night in what is supposedly one of the most haunted places in the United Kingdom: Muncaster Castle. Will they even make it through the night? With psychologists Jason Braithwaite and Jim Houran, we will conduct tests on electromagnetic energy, carbon monoxide and infrasound to see if science can explain what many of us see when the lights go out. Join us in an intriguing investigation at the crossroads of science and the supernatural, with results that just might scare you to death.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Flying over the Himalayan foothills on a short hop from the Nepali capital Kathmandu to the tourist city of Pokhara, Yeti Airlines Flight 691 is cleared to land. And while a passenger live streams the final approach—and just seconds from the runway—the plane stalls and crashes into a gorge. Destroyed on impact, investigators find a scene of utter annihilation at the crash site. Eyewitness video gives them their first lead—the aircraft came in at a severe left bank. And the wreckage indicates the engines were in the feathered position, and therefore unable to provide thrust. A deep dive soon proves their was nothing wrong with the plane. And when investigators listen to the CVR, theyre stunned to uncover overloaded pilots and a fatal case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Minutes before the noise curfew, a privately chartered Gulfstream III is on final approach to Aspen, Colorado amid heavy snow. And though the plane directly ahead aborts its landing due to poor visibility, AvJet N303GA emerges from the clouds, tries to line up with the single runway, and crashes—instantly claiming the lives of all 18 people on board. With no signs of mechanical failure, investigators learn the plane dropped well below minimum altitude on approach. And though a deep dive into the pilots backgrounds reveals no red flags, the planes wreckless trajectory begins to make sense when they look into what happened before the late takeoff from Los Angeles. Client pressure blurred the lines between safety and customer satisfaction. And as a result, the confused pilots were determined to land the plane at Aspen—in spite of the risks. Final

programme.title: Superstructures: Engineering Marvels
programme.desc: This brand new series reveals the extraordinary feats of engineering hidden inside the worlds most spectacular man-made constructions. From the worlds biggest plane and largest free-spanning dome to the tallest building and the largest space ship, each superstructure is taken apart using state-of-the-art CGI and insight from world class specialists to reveal the startling innovations that turn it from dream to reality.

programme.title: Superstructures: Engineering Marvels
programme.desc: With multinational input, the ISS is currently the largest single structure humans have put into space. Constructed between1998 and 2011, and continuously occupied since November 2000, it now weighs 391 tonnes. The first module, the Russia Zarya, was launched by a Proton rocket 20 Nov 1998. Two weeks later, STS 88, a space shuttle flight, added the NASA Unity, or Node 1 module. Astronauts from STS 88 then connected the two parts of the station together. The truss, solar panels and airlocks were launched in stages throughout the ISS lifetime and in 2017 new docking adapters were added for future commercial spacecraft arrivals. Current plans are to operate to 2024 and maybe 2028.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: The mask of Tutankhamun is one of the most famous finds of ancient Egypt, but close inspection reveals a consistent set of strange marks around all the hieroglyphs spelling Tutankhamuns name. Could the name have been engraved over top of another? In North America during World War II, strange and insidious-looking devices made of wood, rope, sandbags and gunpowder were found scattered across the northwestern USA and Canada. Who made them, and what was their sinister purpose? And in East London, a decorative clay bottle from the Middle Ages is uncovered. Not so strange, until the plug was removed and the bottles contents revealed to include rusty nails, centuries-old human hair, fingernails … and urine. What is this sorcery?

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: Towering 13 feet tall and over 11,000 years old, the Vulture Stone is a mysterious message from the end of the Ice Age, one of many relief carvings found at the site of Gobekli Tepe in Turkey. What can its strange depictions of birds, a scorpion and a headless man mean? A disturbing dome-like mask with a box where the mouth should be is the legacy of 1920s inventor and sci-fi writer Hugo Gernsback. His goal was peace and quiet on demand, but did he instead pre-empt the medical and torture applications of sensory deprivation? In a Swiss church stands a fearsome skeleton clothed in a suit of armor that is as exotic as it is impractical. Who would go to the trouble of creating such an ornately macabre work of art, and whose skeleton is it?

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: Easter Islands tall stone moai have long captured the global imagination, and there are still mysteries surrounding them. Out of nearly 1,000, why is one particular moai, called Tukuturi, the only one kneeling and sporting a beard? In 1950s USA, sightings of UFOs were a national phenomenon. Alien or not, many Americans didnt realize that the US military was working their own flying saucer: the Avrocar. And just after Newtons discoveries about gravity, 18th-century German physician Franz Anton Mesmer also proposed an invisible force that he called ""animal magnetism." To harness it, he built a device from a giant wooden tub saying it could cure any illness. Patients seemed to corroborate the claim, but could it be true?

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue: Highway Havoc!
programme.desc: Journey through the unforgiving and inhospitable climate of Norways frozen mountains with the elite rescue crews who come to the aid of stranded travellers and battle round-the-clock to maintain access to vital road links. With sudden changes in the weather, from torrential rain to snow blizzards and sudden temperature changes, the teams have their work cut out for them. Risking life and limb in some of Europes harshest conditions, it takes a special breed of men and women to overcome the many challenges thay face on a daily basis. As the roads turn into icy bobsleigh tracks, haulage container vehicles and private cars and vans all get themselves into difficulties and need to be rescued by our road warrior heroes.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: Its not just rookie drivers who make mistakes on treacherous journeys. Sometimes its the rescuers who are rookies and learning the ropes. In this episode, Thord and Erlend rescue a 50-ton truck that took a steep hill too fast, Bjoern comes to the aid of a truck blocking a tunnel because the driver didnt use chains, Ole Henriks new recruit Stig is in charge of a rescue operation but has to call in the boss.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue: Highway Havoc!
programme.desc: Journey through the unforgiving and inhospitable climate of Norways frozen mountains with the elite rescue crews who come to the aid of stranded travellers and battle round-the-clock to maintain access to vital road links. With sudden changes in the weather, from torrential rain to snow blizzards and sudden temperature changes, the teams have their work cut out for them. Risking life and limb in some of Europes harshest conditions, it takes a special breed of men and women to overcome the many challenges thay face on a daily basis. As the roads turn into icy bobsleigh tracks, haulage container vehicles and private cars and vans all get themselves into difficulties and need to be rescued by our road warrior heroes.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Springtime brings new opportunities and hazards for Indigenous Alaskans. Marvin Agnot takes his nephew Justin across the bay to hunt for goats among the cliffs. John Pingayak imparts survival skills to his grandson. "Tig" Strassburg, eager to bring his seven kids to their ancestral fish camp, builds an arctic mini-van. Joel Jacko travels across melting ice to hunt for small game.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: In an ever-changing climate, Alaska natives utilize the resources of the arctic to sustain their lives. The Apassingok family navigates the Bering Sea to harvest food after a slow winter season. Jody Potts-Joseph and family attempt to secure a winter moose. Tig Strassburg and his sons pursue a wolverine. And John Pingayak and his grandson travel the tundra in search of opportunity for food.

programme.title: Primal Survivor
programme.desc: Hazen Audel, survival instructor and wilderness guide, travels to the most extreme places on earth to take on solo challenges that will push him to the limit of his knowledge, endurance and skills. Battling dense Guyana jungle, parched Kenyan plains and an active volcano in the Pacific Vanuatu islands. To succeed, he will rely on the ancient techniques of indigenous people who have lived in these environments for thousands of years.

programme.title: Primal Survivor
programme.desc: Hazen Audel travels to Suriname to meet the Saramacca tribe, descended from African slaves who fled their captors 300 years ago. Hes keen to witness a traditional fire dance which few outsiders ever get to see, but first he must prove himself worthy to his hosts by heading into the wilderness alone surviving off the land and the River. But this is the Amazon basin and danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: A routine flight from London Heathrow to Belfast International Airport ended in tragedy when British Midland Flight 92 crashed onto a motorway embankment near the town of Kegworth on 8th January 1989. An engine failure meant the crew would have to make what should have been a straightforward emergency landing. Tragically, the pilots mistakenly identified and shut-off the wrong engine, leading to a catastrophic crash near the M1. In this episode, survivors give us their first-hand account of the horrific accident..

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Pakistan International Airlines Flight 8303 was near the end of its 90-minute journey from Lahore to Karachi when it dramatically crashed on 22 May 2020. While attempting a second approach after a failed landing, the Airbus A320 tragically collided with a densely populated residential area of Karachi only a few kilometres from the runway. In this episode, we hear from one of only two survivors of the horrific crash..

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Flying over the Himalayan foothills on a short hop from the Nepali capital Kathmandu to the tourist city of Pokhara, Yeti Airlines Flight 691 is cleared to land. And while a passenger live streams the final approach—and just seconds from the runway—the plane stalls and crashes into a gorge. Destroyed on impact, investigators find a scene of utter annihilation at the crash site. Eyewitness video gives them their first lead—the aircraft came in at a severe left bank. And the wreckage indicates the engines were in the feathered position, and therefore unable to provide thrust. A deep dive soon proves their was nothing wrong with the plane. And when investigators listen to the CVR, theyre stunned to uncover overloaded pilots and a fatal case of mistaken identity.

We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Wild Lapland
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. A lyrical portrayal of the enchanting, wild creatures who call Lapland home.

programme.title: Australias Land of the Ancients
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent.

programme.title: Extraordinary Australia
programme.desc: Australias coastline is a true natural wonder, encompassing a diverse range of bountiful habitats.

programme.title: Extraordinary Australia
programme.desc: From lush ancient rainforests to wet grassland and dry eucalyptus forest, Australias diverse habitats are home to an array of weird and wonderful creatures found nowhere else on the planet. From the bizarre anatomy of the platypus to the savage screams of Tasmanian devils, the creatures of Australia rely on extraordinary adaptations to survive in continents vast and diverse habitats.

programme.title: Snow School
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. When every day is a snow day, school is always in session! Snowy climates can make for harsh living, and adulting is hard no matter where you are, but these young are flourishing.

programme.title: Australias Land of the Ancients
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent.

programme.title: Extraordinary Australia
programme.desc: Australias coastline is a true natural wonder, encompassing a diverse range of bountiful habitats.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: The emperors are the largest and strongest of all penguins, living in the coldest, most extreme place on Earth. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory embeds with an Antarctic colony and encounters social skills never filmed before. As the planet rapidly warms, he discovers bonds forged from birth between family, friends and strangers are the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Barn Again. This family farm needs a barn! The Pols are ready to tackle their next big project: preserving and carefully taking down a 100-year-old barn since, with every piece they remove makes the barn weaker and weaker.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Barnstorming. The Pols have reached the most dangerous stage of disassembling the 100-year-old barn: taking down the beams. Then, if all goes well, theyll transport the beams back to the farm.

programme.title: Wild India
programme.desc: The Indian monsoon forest is a place of retreat and extremes. From the drought of the dry season to the floods of the monsoon, all animal inhabitants are subject to the laws of nature. The Bengal tiger, Asias largest predator, reigns supreme here. Indian elephants roam the forest following the migration routes of their ancestors. And in the jungle, the king cobra lies in wait for prey. Whether migrating, raising their young or defending themselves against predators - only the most resourceful and inventive animals survive the brutal dry season before the monsoon.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Embark on a spectacular journey around the world in search of natures deadliest predators. See how mammals, insects, fish, and birds fight for survival using a fascinating combination of hunting strategies.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Polar Bears
programme.desc: As the Arctic changes faster than ever, a team of polar bear guides prepares for an epic journey; a first-ever attempt to follow the bears on the sea ice of Hudson Bay. In this high-stakes high-reward venture, they will document the secret world of bears, a mysterious and disappearing realm that is the bears key to survival. Life on the ice is a critical time for these bears. It also remains undocumented, deemed too dangerous for humans to follow, hinted at only through aerial reconnaissance and satellite collar research. The team, armed with traditional ecological knowledge and the latest 4K camera technology, will witness never- before-seen seal hunting strategies and document rapid adaptations to climate change, including whale predation and open-water hunting.

programme.title: Wild India
programme.desc: The Indian monsoon forest is a place of retreat and extremes. From the drought of the dry season to the floods of the monsoon, all animal inhabitants are subject to the laws of nature. The Bengal tiger, Asias largest predator, reigns supreme here. Indian elephants roam the forest following the migration routes of their ancestors. And in the jungle, the king cobra lies in wait for prey. Whether migrating, raising their young or defending themselves against predators - only the most resourceful and inventive animals survive the brutal dry season before the monsoon.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Embark on a spectacular journey around the world in search of natures deadliest predators. See how mammals, insects, fish, and birds fight for survival using a fascinating combination of hunting strategies.

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Eagles And Hawks. Few hunters in nature boast the power and majesty of birds of prey. Hunting defines the very quintessence of their bodies and their senses. No other hunters possess such powerful eyesight, such effective talons or their speed.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
